text_fr: depenses  du  Bureau  international  des  declarations  de deces de personnes disparues pour 1956 et 1957 a raison de  4,61  pour  100,  conformement  au  paragraphe  4  de la  resolution  970  (X),  et  pour  1958 a raison  de  4,15 pour 100, conformement au paragraphe 6 de la presente resolution ;
text_en: Expenditure of the International Bureau on the Declarations of Disappeared Persons for 1956 and 1957 is 4.61 per cent, in accordance with paragraph 4 of Resolution 970 (X), and for 1958 is 4.15 per cent, in accordance with paragraph 6 of this Resolution;

items_fr: 9. Prie  instamment les  Etats  Membres,  clans  les limites  de  leurs  procedures  constitutionnelles,  de  re› chercher  des  mesures  appropriees  de  nature a assurer que leurs  contributions  annuelles a l'Organisation seront versees a une date aussi  rapprochee que  possible du  debut  de  l'exercice;

Prie le  Secretaire general  de  continuer en  1958, en  vertu  du  pouvoir  que  lui  confere  le  paragraphe  3 de  la  resolution  970  ( X), a donner  une  application aussi  etendue  que  possible  aux  dispositions  permettant qu'une fraction  des  contributions  des  Etats  Membres soit  versee  clans  des  monnaies  autres  que  le  dollar  des Etats-Unis.
items_en: 9. Urges Member States, within the limits of their constitutional procedures, to seek appropriate measures to ensure that their annual contributions to the Organization are paid as close as possible to the beginning of the financial year;

Requests the Secretary-General to continue in 1958, by virtue of the power conferred on him by paragraph 3 of resolution 970 (X), to apply as fully as possible the provisions allowing a fraction of the contributions of Member States to be paid in currencies other than the United States dollar.

text_fr: 1224  (XII).  Offre par le Gouvernement du Chill d'un  terrain a Santiago  pour  servir  d'em· placement a des  bureaux  de }'Organisation des Nations  Unies  et d'autres organisations internationales
text_en: 1224 (XII). Offer by the Chill Government of a plot of land in Santiago to be used as a placement in offices of the United Nations and other international organizations

text_fr: L' Assemblee generale,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Tenant  compte des  rapports  du  Secretaire  general 28 concernant l'offre du  Gouvernement  chilien  de  ceder a l'Organisation des  Nations Unies, a titre  gracieux,  une parcelle  de  terrain  sise a Santiago  pour  servir  d'em› placement a un immeuble  qui  abriterait  les  services  de 1'0rganisation et  des  institutions  specialisees  installes au  Chili,
text_en: Taking into account the reports of the Secretary General 28 concerning the offer of the Government of Chile to the United Nations, on a gratuitous basis, a parcel of land located in Santiago to be used as an investment in a building that would house the services of the Organization and specialized institutions established in Chile,

text_fr: Prenant note de  la resolution  138  (VII)  de la Com› mission  economique  pour  l'Amerique  latine,  en  date du  28  mai  1957,  qui  a  ete  transmise  au  Secretaire general  pour  que  l'Assemblee generale  l'examine a sa douzieme  session,  ainsi  que  du  rapport  du  comite special  de  l'immeuble  de  la  Commission  economique pour l'Amerique latine,  comite  cree  par la  Commission conformement a ladite  resolution,
text_en: Taking note of Commission Resolution 138 (VII) of 28 May 1957 on the Economic Mission for Latin America, which was transmitted to the Secretary General for consideration by the General Assembly at its twelfth session, and of the report of the Special Committee on the Building of the Economic Commission for Latin America, established by the Commission in accordance with that resolution,

text_fr: Considerant les  avantages  incontestables  que  pre› sente,  pour  la  bonne  marche  des  travaux  des  Nations Unies  en  Amerique  latine,  l'offre faite  par  le  Gouver› nement  chilien,  telle  qu'elle est  exposee  en  detail  clans le  rapport  du Secretaire  general 29 ,
text_en: Considering the undeniable advantages which the Chilean Government has given to the smooth running of the work of the United Nations in Latin America, as detailed in the report of the Secretary General 29,

text_fr: Considerant que  la  construction  de  l'immeuble en› visage  permettra  d'etahlir des  services  communs  pour l'Organisation  des  Nations  Unies  et  les  institutions specialisees  qui  ont des  bureaux a Santiago,  ainsi  qu'il a  ete  maintes  fois  demande  aux  reunions  des  organes des  Nations  Unies  qui  s'occupent des  questions  admi› nistratives,
text_en: Recognizing that the construction of the face-to-face building will enable common services to be established for the United Nations and the specialized agencies that have offices in Santiago, as he has repeatedly called upon the meetings of the United Nations bodies dealing with administrative matters,

text_fr: Considerant qu'il faut  adopter  des  mesures  efficaces pour executer  ce  projet clans  les  meilleures  conditions possibles,
text_en: Recognizing the need for effective measures to implement this project in the best possible conditions,

items_fr: 1. Invite le Secretaire  general a accepter  l'offre genereuse  du  Gouvernement  chilien  en  lui  exprimant sa gratitude ;
2. Autorise le Secretaire  general a engager,  avec les gouvernements des Etats membres de la Commission
items_en: 1. Invites the Secretary-General to accept the generous offer of the Government of Chile and to express his gratitude to the Secretary-General;
2. Authorizes the Secretary-General to undertake, with the Governments of the Member States of the Commission

text_fr: 28 [bid., point  50  de  l'ordre du  jour,  documents  A/3641  et A/C.5/712. .
text_en: 28 [bid., agenda item 50, documents A/3641 and A/C.5/712. .

text_en: economics for Latin America, Jes negociati<;>nS intended for the financing of the construction10n of the United Nations building in Santiago and to meet as it deems necessary with the representatives of those governments;

items_en: 3. Requests the Secretary General to present to the As› sem blee generale, at its thirteenth session, in accordance with the proposals he has formulated, detailed plans for the construction of the building and the arrangements for its financing and any observations which may be made on this subject by the Committee on Administrative and Budgetary Questions.

text_en: 1225 (XIl). Pay, compensation and benefits in force a) United Nations: amendments to the Staff Regulations of the Organization

text_fr: Ayant examine Jes  rapports  du  Secretaire  general 80 et  du  Comite  consultatif  pour  Jes  questions  adminis› tratives  et  budgetaires 31 sur  certaines  questions  en suspens  concernant  le  regime  des  traitements,  indem› nites  et  prestations  en  vigueur a !'Organisation  des Nations  U nies,
text_en: Having examined the reports of the Secretary General 80 and of the Advisory Committee on Administrative and Budgetary Questions, 31 on certain outstanding issues concerning the system of salaries, allowances and benefits in force in the United Nations,

text_fr: Decide de  modifier le  Statut du personnel  de  l'Orga› nisation  des  Nations  Unies par  les  amendements  figu› rant en  annexe a la  presente  resolution,  qui  prendront effet  le  ler janvier  1958.
text_en: Decides to amend the Staff Regulations of the Orga› nization of the United Nations by the amendments contained in the annex to the present resolution, which will take effect on 1 January 1958.

text_fr: 1226  (XII).  Question  de  la  repartition  geogra· phique  du  personnel  du  Secretariat  de }'Organisation  des  Nations  Unies
text_en: 1226 (XII). Question of the geographical distribution of the staff of the United Nations Secretariat

text_fr: L' Assemblee generate,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Ayant examine le  rapport 32 que le  Secretaire general lui  a  presente,  a  sa  douzieme  session,  au  sujet  des changements  intervenus  clans  la  repartition  geogra› phique  du  personnel  du  Secretariat  de  !'Organisation des  Nations  Unies  au  cours  de  l'annee  terminee  le 31  aout  1957,
text_en: Having examined the report submitted by the Secretary-General to him, at his dubious session, on the changes in the geographical distribution of the staff of the Secretariat of the United Nations during the year ending 31 August 1957,

text_fr: Rappe/ant qu'au paragraphe  1  de  sa  resolution  1097 (XI) du 27 fevrier 1957 elle a  recommande, !orsque !'on engagera de nouveaux  fonctionnaires  au  Secretariat de !'Organisation des  Nations  Unies,  a  quelque  echelon que  ce  soit,  de  donner  la  preference  voulue  aux  natio-› nalites  qui,  proportionnellernent,  sont  peu  representees au  Secretariat,  sous  reserve  des  dispositions  du  para› graphe  3  de  !'Article  101  de  la  Charte  des  Nations Unies,
text_en: Report/that in paragraph 1 of its resolution 1097 (XI) of 27 February 1957 it recommended, when new officials will be hired at the United Nations Secretariat, at any stage, to give the desired preference to the nalites who, proportionally, are not represented in the Secretariat, subject to the provisions of paragraph 3 of Article 101 of the Charter of the United Nations,

text_fr: N otant que  les  nominations  enumerees  dans  le  rap› port  du  Secretaire  general  marquent  un  progres  vers Jes  buts  vises  clans  cette  recommandation,
text_en: Without prejudice to the fact that the appointments listed in the report of the Secretary General mark a progress towards my goals aimed at this recommendation,

text_fr: Exprim,ant  sa  satisfaction des  mesures  que  le  Secre› taire  general  a  deja  prises  pour  donner  suite  a  ladite recommandation,
text_en: Expressing its satisfaction with the measures already taken by the Secretary-General to implement that recommendation,

text_fr: Prie le  Secretaire  general :
text_en: Requests the Secretary General:

items_fr: a)  De  poursuivre  ses  efforts  pour  que,  Iorsque  l'on engagera de  nouveaux  fonctionnaires  au  Secretariat de !'Organisation des  Nations  Unies, a quelque  echelon que  ce  soit,  ii  soit  donne  suite,  dans  toute  la  mesure possible,  a  la recommandation visee au paragraphe 1 de la  resolution  1097  ( XI)  de  I' Assemblee  generale,  en date  du 27  fevrier  1957;
b) De faire  rapport  a  I' Assemblee  generale,  lors  de sa tre\_iziemc  session,  sur  Jes  resultats  des  efforts  qu'il aura deployes dans ce  sens.
items_en: (a) To continue its efforts to ensure that, when new staff are recruited to the Secretariat of the United Nations, the recommendation contained in paragraph 1 of General Assembly resolution 1097 ( XI) of 27 February 1957 is implemented to the greatest extent possible;
(b) To report to the General Assembly at its thirty-sixth session on the results of its efforts in this direction.

text_fr: 1228  (XII).  Ecole  internationale des Nations Unies  et  locaux  pour  les  delegations
text_en: 1228 (XII). United Nations International School and Delegations

text_fr: A
text_en: A

text_fr: L' Assemblee generaJe,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Ayant examine le  rapport du Secretaire general 3 · sur !'Ecole internationale  des  Nations  Unies,
text_en: Having examined the report of the Secretary General 3 on the United Nations International School,

text_fr: 32 I bid., document  A/C.5/718/Rev.1.
text_en: 32 I bid., document A/C.5/718/Rev.1.

text_fr: 3:l Ibid., document  A/C.5/726.
text_en: 3:l Ibid., document A/C.5/726.

text_fr: 34 Ibid., point  52  de  l'ordre clu  jonr,  document  A/3688.
text_en: 34 Ibid., item 52 of the provisional agenda, document A/3688.

text_fr: Constatant que  l'Ecole a  un besoin  urgent de  locaux permanents et qu'avis lui  a  ete  donne  d'evacuer en  juin 1959  ses  locaux temporaires actuels,
text_en: Noting that the School has an urgent need for permanent premises and that it was advised to vacate its current temporary premises in June 1959,

text_fr: Constatant que,  afin  de repondre aux besoins du plus grand  nombre  possible  d'enfants de  fonctionnaires  de !'Organisation des  Nations Unies,  de  delegues  et d'au› tres  personnes ayant  des  liens  avec  l'Organisation, ces locaux  permanents devraient etre situes a  Manhattan,
text_en: Recognizing that, in order to meet the needs of as many children as possible of United Nations officials, delegates and other persons with links to the United Nations, these permanent premises should be located in Manhattan,

text_fr: Constatant  en  outre que,  selon  le  Secretaire general, en  fournissant  a  !'Ecole les  locaux  qui  Jui  conviennent vraiment,  on  ne  peut que  servir Jes  interets  de  !'Orga› nisation,
text_en: Noting further that, according to the Secretary General, by providing a!'School the premises that Jui really suits, one can only serve Jes interets de !'Orga› nisation,

text_fr: Rappelant sa  resolution  1102  (XI)  du 27 fevrier 1957  sur  cette  question,  et  rappelant  en  particulier  y avoir  reconnu  que  le  fonctionnement  permanent  de !'Ecole est l'un des  facteurs  extra-financiers  importants qui  aident  a recruter  et  a conserver  des  fonctionnaires internationaux,
text_en: Recalling its resolution 1102 (XI) of 27 February 1957 on this issue, and recalling in particular its recognition that the permanent operation of the School is one of the important extra-financial factors that help to recruit and retain international civil servants,

items_fr: 1. Prie le  Secretaire general  de  consulter  les  auto› rites  competentes  sur  la  possibilite  de  construire  des locaux  permanents  pour  !'Ecole  internationale  des Nations Unies sur le  terrain du  Siege de  !'Organisation des  Nations  Unies;

2. Prie le Secretaire  general  d'user  de  ses  bons offices  pour aider  le  Conseil  d'administration de  !'Ecole a trouver  un  terrain  pour  !'Ecole  a  Manhattan,  y compris  le  "district administratif", a faire  preparer des plans pour le  batiment,  a  poursuivre ses  efforts  en  vue d'obtenir des  fonds  de  sources  privees  pour  la  cons› truction de  !'Ecole et,  le  cas  echeant,  pour  !'acquisition d'un terrain a cette  fin;
3. Prie le  Secretaire general d'user de  ses  bons  offi› ces  pour aider !'Ecole a  trouver des locaux satisfaisants, en  attendant l'achevement des  locaux permanents;

4. Prie le Secretaire  general  de  presenter  a  I' As› semblee generale,  lors  de  sa  treizieme  session,  un  rap› port sur Jes  progres qui auront pu etre realises au  sujet de  cette  question,  accompagne,  le  cas  echeant,  des  ob› servations  formulees  par le  Comite  consultatif  pour les questions  administratives  et  budgetaires.
items_en: 1. Requests the Secretary General to consult the competent auto› rites on the possibility of building permanent premises for the United Nations International School in the field of the Siege de !' United Nations;

2. Requests the Secretary General to use his good offices to assist the Board of Directors of !'School has to find a ground for !'School in Manhattan, including the "Administrative District", to have plans for the building prepared, to continue his efforts to obtain funds from private sources for the construction of !'School and, in the case at hand, to acquire a land for this purpose;
3. Requests the Secretary General to use his vouchers offi› these to help!'School has found satisfactory premises, pending the completion of the permanent premises;

4. Requests the Secretary-General to present to the General Assembly, at its thirteenth session, a report on the progress made on this issue, together with the observations formulated by the Advisory Committee on Administrative and Budgetary Questions.

text_en: 731st plcnierc meeting, 14 December 1957.

text_fr: B
text_en: B

text_fr: L' Assemblee generale,
text_en: The General Assembly,

text_fr: Tenant  compte des  debats  qui  ont  eu  lieu  !ors  de sessions  precedentes  a  propos  de  la  construction  d'un batiment pour Jes  delegations  a  proximite  du  Siege  de !'Organisation  des  Nations  Unies,  ainsi  que  de  l'in› teret  croissant  que  de  nombreuses  delegations  mani› festent  pour  un  batiment  de  ce  genre,
text_en: Taking into account the debates that have taken place in previous sessions about the construction of a building for Jes delegations a proximite of the United Nations Headquarters, as well as the growing in›teret that many delegations are celebrating for a building of this kind,

items_fr: 1. Prie le Secretaire  general  d'user  de  ses  boos offices  pour  rechercher  s'il existe  des  moyens  pratiques de  mettre des locaux a la  disposition  des  delegations  ,t proximite  du  Siege  de  !'Organisation  des  Nations Unies;

2. Prie le  Secretaire  general  de  presenter  a  I' As› semblee  generale,  !ors  de  sa treizieme  session,  un  rap› port sur les progres qui  auront pu etre realises au sujet de  cette  question.
items_en: 1. Requests the Secretary-General to use his boos offices to ascertain whether there are practical ways of making premises available to the delegations ,t proximity of the Siege de !' United Nations;
2. Requests the Secretary General to present to the General Assembly, at its thirteenth session, a report on the progress that has been made on this issue.
